subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enfolded in the glances of the All-Merciful, two letters containing the realities and meanings of Divine love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المشمول بلحظات اعین الرحمانیه دو مکتوب که محتوی حقائق و معانی محبت الهیه
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @poems and quotation from poetry, @business; financial; property matters
